reply:
[[BLOCK:slide68_shape1]]
SAS's Generalized Regression (广义回归 (Generalized Regression)) accepts all types of data (categorical and continuous). Therefore, Generalized Regression can serve as an alternative to Ordinary Least Squares Regression (OLS Regression) (普通最小二乘回归 (OLS Regression)) and logistic regression models.  
It is capable of addressing Multi-collinearity (多重共线性 (Multi-collinearity)) issues.  
It can prevent overfitting.  
Unlike the one-time approach in traditional regression modeling, Generalized Regression explores various solutions, with the final result being the optimal solution among all possible paths.
